label: reference-sft-v1
note: Reviewed reference training set: 24 fen_legal_moves_to_move rows from two scripted games (an Italian Game line and a Scandinavian Defense line), converted with the same build_sft_rows the export uses. Authored for the workshop so the cached training replay has a real, hashed dataset to point at; not collected from a live room.
